title: crepidium longispicum
intro: Crepidium longispicum, also known as the Spiranthes longispica, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat various ailments in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Crepidium longispicum can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water, and it can also be used in the form of decoctions or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
